alt: Scarlet macaw showing bright plumage colors
caption: The scarlet macaw's vivid plumage makes it one of the most recognizable birds in Central and South America.
acquisitionNotes: Core article image curated separately from the parrot gallery set. Re-synced canonical Commons URL. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/1/1c/Scarlet_Macaw_Phoenix_Zoo_Mar23_A7R_04528.jpg
attributionText: Photo by This Photo was taken by Timothy A. Gonsalves . Feel free to use my photos, but please mention me as the author. I would much appreciate if you send me an email tagooty@yahoo.com or write on my talk page , for my information. Please contact me before commercial use. Please do not upload an edited image here without consulting me. I would like to make corrections only at my own source to ensure that the changes improve the image and are preserved. Otherwise you may upload an edited image with a new name. Please use one of the templates derivative or extract . via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0
